products.title: Children's Bunny Necklace

products.title: Custom Pet Necklace
products.description: The most special way to keep your beloved pet close to your heart. Features a custom engraving of your pet's face on a classic heart pendant necklace. HOW TO ORDER: After placing your order, please email a photo of your pet to orders@alisonlou.com . The photo should be a clear high-resolution straight-on portrait of the pet's face. We do not offer engraving for more than one pet at the moment.
